message:
test(fuzz): canonicalize multi-sig ordering + signing bytes (nkfty)

Add fuzz_canonicalize_signatures covering fcp_crypto::canonicalize
multi-signature ordering helpers and signing-context primitives
(canonicalize.rs:20-248). Properties: sort_signatures_by_node_id
returns a permutation of 0..n with non-decreasing output;
verify_signature_order Ok iff strictly increasing (rejects duplicates
and out-of-order pairs); sort_node_signatures + verify_node_signature_order
matching invariants on NodeSignature; schema_hash determinism +
SCHEMA_HASH_SIZE; canonical_signing_bytes layout
(SIGNING_DOMAIN || schema_hash || cbor_bytes) with cbor_bytes preserved
verbatim at the suffix and the documented overall length. Once-gated
anchors verify hand-picked sorts, the layout, schema_hash distinctness
on two known schemas, and the empty/single-element corner cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
